summary: Tested Champion Picks feature (Pronostici Vincitore Campionato). Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%) after fixing MongoDB index. Frontend: All UI elements verified - banner, champion pick screen, side menu item, profile counters.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/champion-picks/teams returns 20 Serie A teams with standings data
VERIFIED: POST /api/champion-picks creates/updates user's champion pick
VERIFIED: GET /api/champion-picks/my returns user's current pick
VERIFIED: GET /api/champion-picks/league returns all league picks with team summary
VERIFIED: Champion Pick banner visible on Home page after TREND section
VERIFIED: Banner shows 'Pronostico Vincitore' and 'Chi vincerà il campionato?'
VERIFIED: Champion Pick screen shows header 'Vincitore Serie A' with league name
VERIFIED: Two tabs: 'La mia scelta' and 'Lega (n/m)'
VERIFIED: Team list shows 20 teams with logos, points, played, W/D/L, form indicators
VERIFIED: User's current pick shown in banner with green checkmark
VERIFIED: Lega tab shows 'Pronostici per squadra' summary with bar chart
VERIFIED: Lega tab shows 'Scelte dei giocatori' with user picks
VERIFIED: Side menu contains 'Pronostico Vincitore' in LEGA section
VERIFIED: Profile page shows 'I MIEI TORNEI' counter
VERIFIED: Profile page theme toggle shows 'Attivo' badge instead of switch
VERIFIED: Medal icon (Palmares) present in header (top right)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Champion Picks feature is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs all pass. Frontend UI renders correctly with teams, tabs, save functionality. Side menu has 'Pronostico Vincitore' item in LEGA section. Profile page shows tournament count and 'Attivo' badge for theme toggle.

mongodb_index_fix.issue: DuplicateKeyError when saving champion pick - index was (user_id, season_id, competition) but should include league_id
mongodb_index_fix.fix: Dropped old index and created new index: (user_id, season_id, competition, league_id)
mongodb_index_fix.command: db.champion_picks.dropIndex('user_id_1_season_id_1_competition_1') && db.champion_picks.createIndex({ user_id: 1, season_id: 1, competition: 1, league_id: 1 }, { unique: true })

verified_features.backend_get_teams: PASS - Returns 20 Serie A teams with rank, name, logo, points, played, W/D/L, form
verified_features.backend_post_pick: PASS - Creates new pick or updates existing one
verified_features.backend_get_my_pick: PASS - Returns user's current pick with competition info
verified_features.backend_get_league_picks: PASS - Returns all picks with user info, team summary, counts
verified_features.frontend_banner_home: PASS - 'Pronostico Vincitore' banner visible after TREND section
verified_features.frontend_banner_navigation: PASS - Clicking banner navigates to /champion-pick with league_id param
verified_features.frontend_champion_screen_header: PASS - Shows 'Vincitore Serie A' with league name
verified_features.frontend_champion_screen_teams: PASS - 20 teams with logos, stats, form indicators, radio buttons
verified_features.frontend_champion_screen_save: PASS - Save button appears when different team selected
verified_features.frontend_champion_league_tab: PASS - Shows team summary bar chart and player picks list
verified_features.frontend_profile_theme_toggle: PASS - Shows 'Attivo' badge instead of switch
verified_features.frontend_header_medal_icon: PASS - Medal icon present in top right (Palmares)
